product_overview: BeeGym is a B2B2C SaaS platform for gyms and trainers that centralizes onboarding, student management, workout prescription and PIX EFI payment processing. It delivers tenant-isolated operations with a polished, high-performance UI for owners, staff and instructors.
core_goals: Provide a secure multi-tenant management console for gyms to onboard, manage students and staff, and run daily operations.
Enable reliable payment processing and subscription activation via native PIX EFI integration with webhook confirmation and long-polling UX.
Offer comprehensive student CRM and workout prescription tools that enforce strict domain validations (RG/CPF, address, plan rules).
Enforce strong data isolation (RLS) and fast fail-fast validation (Zod) to prevent invalid writes and cross-tenant leaks.
Deliver an intuitive onboarding flow that ties organization creation to payment activation before granting full application access.

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Login and registration for gym owners and staff with form validations and onboarding interception for new tenants.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field with registered email -> Fill password input field with valid password -> Click Login button to submit -> See redirect to /app/painel
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field with registered email -> Fill password input field with incorrect password -> Click Login button to submit -> See inline error 'Invalid credentials'

Navigate to /register -> Fill name input with valid owner name -> Fill email input field with new valid email -> Fill password input field with password (min 6 chars) -> Fill confirmPassword input matching password -> Click Register button to submit -> See onboarding intercept and redirect to /app/painel with tenant pending activation

Navigate to /register -> Fill email input field with malformed email -> Fill password input field shorter than 6 chars -> Fill confirmPassword input not matching password -> Click Register button to submit -> See form validation errors for email, password, and confirmPassword

features.name: Student Management
features.description: Create, view and manage student profiles, addresses and plan assignments with strict validations (cpf, phone, full address) and modal-driven creation.
user_flows: Navigate to /app/alunos -> See student list -> Click to add new student -> Fill student details modal with valid cpf (14 chars), phone (>=10), street, number, neighborhood, city, state, zip (>=8) -> Click Save student -> See new student appear in list

Navigate to /app/alunos -> Click to add new student -> Fill student details modal with invalid cpf (wrong length) and missing address fields -> Click Save student -> See validation errors for cpf and address fields
Navigate to /app/alunos -> If not authenticated, be redirected to /login

features.name: Workout Prescription
features.description: Assign and manage workouts per student using an exercise library; workouts include exercises, sets and reps (reps accept string values).
user_flows: Navigate to /app/treinos -> Select a student from student selector -> Click Add Workout -> Click Add exercise to workout -> Choose exercise from library -> Define sets/reps fields (reps may be a string like '10-12' or 'Até a falha') -> Click Save workout -> See workout listed for the selected student
Navigate to /app/treinos -> Select a student -> Click Add Workout -> Do not add any exercise -> Click Save workout -> See validation error 'Workout must contain at least one exercise'
Navigate to /app/treinos -> If user lacks authentication/permission, be redirected to /login

features.name: Payment Processing (PIX EFI)
features.description: Generate PIX checkouts (QR + copia-e-cola), monitor payment status and activate tenant access on webhook confirmation from EFI with mTLS validation.
user_flows: Navigate to /app/pagamentos -> See payment status for organization -> Click Generate PIX QR Code for selected plan -> See QR code and copia-e-cola string displayed -> Complete payment externally using PIX -> Wait for EFI webhook confirmation -> See payment status update to PAID and organization activated -> See full access on /app/painel
Navigate to /app/pagamentos -> Click Generate PIX QR Code -> API returns an error -> See error message 'Unable to generate payment'

Navigate to /app/pagamentos -> Click Generate PIX QR Code -> See QR code and copia-e-cola string displayed -> Complete payment externally using PIX -> Backend receives webhook with invalid mTLS credentials -> Payment remains PENDING -> See payment status remain as PENDING with instructions to retry or contact support
Navigate to /app/pagamentos -> If not authenticated, be redirected to /login
